title: Add Page Transition Animations
description: Add fade-in animation when navigating between pages.
solution: Add @keyframes fadeIn to shared CSS. Apply animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease to main element on all pages.

title: Build a Dynamic Navigation with Active State Detection
description: Create navigation that automatically highlights the current page based on URL.
requirements: Matches path to nav link href
solution: On page load, iterate nav links. If href matches current pathname, set aria-current='page'. Remove from others.

title: Create a CMS-like Blog with Dynamic Content Loading
description: Build a blog that loads articles from a JSON data source and renders them dynamically.
requirements: Blog posts stored in a JavaScript array/JSON
Individual article view with full content
hints: Use fetch() or import JSON data
Use URL search params for article IDs
solution: Store blog data as array of objects. Render function creates HTML from data. Filter by category. Paginate with slice(). Single article view via URL parameter.
